# Vendored third-party JS for kiosk avatar widget
# Update this file whenever you upgrade or replace any vendored asset.

three.module.min.js
  version: three@0.170.0
  license: MIT
  source:  https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/three@0.170.0/build/three.module.min.js

GLTFLoader.js
  version: three@0.170.0
  license: MIT
  source:  https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/three@0.170.0/examples/jsm/loaders/GLTFLoader.js
  notes:   imports `from 'three'` (handled via import map in index.html)
           imports `from '../utils/BufferGeometryUtils.js'` (see below)

utils/BufferGeometryUtils.js
  version: three@0.170.0
  license: MIT
  source:  https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/three@0.170.0/examples/jsm/utils/BufferGeometryUtils.js
  notes:   transitive dep of GLTFLoader.js; imports `from 'three'`

qwebchannel.js
  version: Qt 6.x (extracted from raw.githubusercontent.com/qt/qtwebchannel/dev)
  license: LicenseRef-Qt-Commercial OR LGPL-3.0-only OR GPL-2.0-only OR GPL-3.0-only
  source:  https://raw.githubusercontent.com/qt/qtwebchannel/dev/src/webchannel/qwebchannel.js
  notes:   provides `window.QWebChannel`; loaded via classic <script> tag (not ES module)
